Multi-platform social media publishing. Schedule and publish content to LinkedIn, Instagram, Threads, TikTok, X, and 30+ more platforms.
To get your SendIt API key:\n1. Log in t:
To get your SendIt API key:
1. Log in to your [SendIt dashboard](https://sendit.infiniteappsai.com/dashboard)
2. Go to **Settings > API Keys**
3. Click **Create API Key** — the key is only shown once, so copy it immediately
4. Paste the key below (it starts with `sk_live_`)
Publish content to social media platform: Publish content to social media platforms immediately
Schedule content to be published at a fu: Schedule content to be published at a future time
Cancel a scheduled post before it is pub: Cancel a scheduled post before it is published
Check if content meets platform requirem: Check if content meets platform requirements before publishing
Get a list of connected social media acc: Get a list of connected social media accounts
Get a list of pending scheduled posts: Get a list of pending scheduled posts
Make a custom API call to a specific end: Make a custom API call to a specific endpoint
Select one or more social media platform: Select one or more social media platforms to publish to. Make sure your accounts are connected in the SendIt dashboard under **Settings > Connected Accounts**.
The text content of your post. Character: The text content of your post. Character limits vary by platform (e.g. X/Twitter: 280, LinkedIn: 3000, Instagram: 2200).
A publicly accessible URL to an image (J: A publicly accessible URL to an image (JPG, PNG, GIF) or video (MP4). **Required for Instagram and TikTok.** Images must be under 10 MB and videos under 100 MB.
Add multiple publicly accessible image U: Add multiple publicly accessible image URLs to create a carousel post. Supported on Instagram and Threads. Add one URL per item.
Leave as **Auto-detect** unless SendIt m: Leave as **Auto-detect** unless SendIt misidentifies your media. Choose **Image** or **Video** to force a specific type.
When to publish the post. Must be in the: When to publish the post. Must be in the future. Times are interpreted in UTC — convert your local time if needed.
Select the scheduled post you want to ac: Select the scheduled post you want to act on. Only posts with a **Pending** status are listed.
Only return scheduled posts for a specif: Only return scheduled posts for a specific platform. Leave empty to see all platforms.
Authorization headers are injected autom: Authorization headers are injected automatically from your connection.
Enable for files like PDFs, images, etc.
HEAD: HEAD
Triggers when a post is successfully pub: Triggers when a post is successfully published to a platform
Triggers when a post is scheduled for fu: Triggers when a post is scheduled for future publishing
Triggers when a post fails to publish to: Triggers when a post fails to publish to a platform
